'''Cairn''' was an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] in the [[Lenico Belt]] where the [[Imperial Remnant]]'s [[Cairn Installation]] was located in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. [[Galak Fyyar]]'s ship the ''[[Doomgiver]]'' was docked there when [[Kyle Katarn]]'s partner [[Jan Ors]] was being held [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] aboard. It was also where [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] was processed for the armor of the Remnant's new [[shadowtrooper]].

{{Ast-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
A [[Wikipedia:Cairn|cairn]] is a term derived from [[Wikipedia:Scottish Gaelic|Scottish Gaelic]] that refers to artificial stone piles in the real world.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' {{1st}}
